Japan.contemporary_style: Harajuku street style, minimalist (Uniqlo aesthetic), techwear, kawaii, visual kei
Japan.dress_codes: Conservative in business (dark suits). Expressive in Shibuya/Harajuku. Remove shoes indoors. Cover tattoos at onsen/gyms.

seasonal_tips.spring: Light layers, cherry blossom pastels, comfortable walking shoes for hanami
seasonal_tips.summer: Breathable fabrics, yukata for festivals, sun protection essentials
seasonal_tips.fall: Earth tones, layered outerwear, cozy knits
seasonal_tips.winter: Heavy coats, scarves, heat-tech undergarments, waterproof boots

Japan.fashion_etiquette: Modesty appreciated in temples/shrines. Neat appearance valued highly.

Italy.contemporary_style: La bella figura — polished, put-together always. Tailored silhouettes, quality fabrics, understated elegance
Italy.dress_codes: Dress well everywhere, even for errands. Cover shoulders/knees in churches. No athletic wear outside the gym.

seasonal_tips.spring: Trench coats, loafers, light scarves, pastel and neutral palettes
seasonal_tips.summer: Linen everything, espadrilles, sunglasses, light cotton dresses
seasonal_tips.fall: Leather jackets, ankle boots, rich earth tones, layered knits
seasonal_tips.winter: Wool coats, cashmere scarves, elegant boots, dark sophisticated palettes

Italy.fashion_etiquette: Italians notice shoes first. Invest in quality footwear. Avoid overly casual or sloppy looks.

India.contemporary_style: Indo-western fusion, bold colors, rich textiles, embroidery, mix of traditional and modern
India.dress_codes: Conservative in religious sites (cover shoulders, knees). Bright colors welcomed at festivals. White for mourning.

seasonal_tips.spring: Light cotton kurtas, breathable fabrics, floral prints
seasonal_tips.summer: Loose cotton/linen, light colors, sandals, sun protection
seasonal_tips.fall: Festival season: vibrant colors, embroidered pieces, traditional wear
seasonal_tips.winter: Pashmina shawls, layered ethnic wear, warm tones (north India gets cold)

India.fashion_etiquette: Remove shoes before entering homes/temples. Dress conservatively in rural areas. Jewelry is culturally significant.

Morocco.contemporary_style: Blend of North African and French influences, vibrant patterns, artisanal textiles
Morocco.dress_codes: Modest dress preferred — cover shoulders and knees, especially in medinas and mosques. Loose-fitting clothing recommended.

seasonal_tips.spring: Light layers, comfortable walking shoes for medinas, breathable fabrics
seasonal_tips.summer: Very hot — light cotton/linen, loose fits, hat and sunscreen essential
seasonal_tips.fall: Pleasant temperatures, layering pieces, desert-appropriate evening layers
seasonal_tips.winter: Riads can be cold — warm layers, especially for mountain areas

Morocco.fashion_etiquette: Modest dress shows cultural respect. Bargaining at souks is expected. Traditional craftsmanship highly valued.

South Korea.contemporary_style: K-fashion: clean lines, oversized silhouettes, monochrome palettes, K-pop influenced, gender-fluid trends
South Korea.dress_codes: Fashion-forward and put-together in Seoul. Avoid overly revealing clothing in traditional areas. Clean sneakers are essential.

seasonal_tips.spring: Pastel colors, light jackets, cherry blossom season aesthetic
seasonal_tips.summer: Light fabrics, shorts acceptable, K-beauty sun protection
seasonal_tips.fall: Trench coats, layering season, warm earth tones and plaid
seasonal_tips.winter: Heavy padded jackets (long padding trend), warm accessories, boots

South Korea.fashion_etiquette: Koreans invest heavily in appearance. Matching couple outfits are common. Skincare is part of fashion.

France.contemporary_style: Effortless chic — quality over quantity, neutral palette, mix of high and low, understated elegance
France.dress_codes: Well-dressed in most settings. Avoid athletic wear as daily wear. Dark colors dominate Parisian wardrobes.

seasonal_tips.spring: Trench coat essential, Breton stripes, ballet flats, light scarves
seasonal_tips.summer: Linen dresses, espadrilles, wicker bags, effortless sundresses
seasonal_tips.fall: Blazers, ankle boots, scarves as accessories, burgundy/navy tones
seasonal_tips.winter: Wool coats, turtlenecks, quality leather boots, all-black ensembles

France.fashion_etiquette: Less is more. French style values quality, fit, and looking like you didn't try too hard.

Brazil.contemporary_style: Vibrant colors, body-confident fits, beachwear culture, tropical prints, relaxed elegance
Brazil.dress_codes: Casual and colorful in daily life. Beach culture influences everyday wear. Smart casual for business.

seasonal_tips.spring: Floral prints, light dresses, sandals, bright accessories
seasonal_tips.summer: Minimal layers, swimwear culture, bold colors, resort wear
seasonal_tips.fall: Light jackets, jeans, boots in southern regions
seasonal_tips.winter: Mild — layers in south, still warm in north. Leather jackets popular.

Brazil.fashion_etiquette: Brazilians are fashion-conscious and body-positive. Beachwear is distinct from daily wear in cities.

UAE / Dubai.contemporary_style: Luxury-focused, designer brands, modest fashion meets high fashion, gold accessories
UAE / Dubai.dress_codes: Modest dress in public — cover shoulders and knees. More relaxed in hotels/resorts. Friday dress is traditional.

seasonal_tips.spring: Light modest layers, breathable fabrics, sunglasses
seasonal_tips.summer: Extreme heat — ultra-light fabrics, indoor mall culture, resort wear at hotels
seasonal_tips.fall: Still warm — similar to spring, evening events may be outdoors
seasonal_tips.winter: Most pleasant — light jacket for evenings, outdoor fashion events season

UAE / Dubai.fashion_etiquette: Respect local customs with modest clothing. Luxury is appreciated. Dubai Fashion Week growing in global influence.
